B-FOOD-0001.prompt:
Subject (피사체): bingsu tower — condensed milk pour, sliced strawberries, matcha dust. Textures hyper-real — steam wisps, glossy sauce, crisp edges, dewy herbs.
Context (촬영 맥락): Commercial food photography for hotel all-day-dining weekend CRM email. Shot on medium-format, 100mm macro lens, f/4.5, ISO 200, tripod-locked.
Composition (구도): top-down flat-lay, generous negative space around plate. upper 30% empty for headline.
Lighting (라이팅): soft window light from camera-left, silver bounce fill right, slight haze backlight. Controlled specular on sauce, no blown highlights, careful shadow transitions.
Color palette (팔레트): glossy red glaze, gold amber, scallion green, matte black.
Surface & styling (테이블·스타일링): rustic ttukbaegi or cast-iron pan on dark wooden table. propwork minimal — one small side dish and a linen napkin only.
Post (후보정): color-accurate commercial retouching, warm neutral grade, no yellow cast, no instagram filter, no over-saturation of reds, preserve natural grain of ingredients.
Negative (금지): no text, no menu overlay, no packaging mockup, no brand logos, no plastic-looking fake food, no extreme fisheye, no overcrowded frame, no unclean plate edges.
B-FOOD-0001.revised: Top-down flat-lay commercial food photograph of a towering Korean bingsu dessert in a rustic ttukbaegi or cast-iron pan on a dark wooden table. The bingsu tower features a condensed milk pour cascading down, sliced fresh strawberries, and a delicate dusting of matcha powder. Hyper-real textures: subtle steam wisps, glossy sauce, crisp strawberry edges, dewy green herb/scallion accents. Generous negative space around the plate with the upper 30% of the frame intentionally empty for a headline. Minimal props only: one small side dish and a single linen napkin. Lighting: soft window light from camera-left, silver bounce fill on the right, slight hazy backlight; controlled specular highlights on the sauce, no blown highlights, smooth shadow transitions. Color palette: glossy red glaze, gold amber tones, scallion green, matte black accents. Shot style: medium-format look, 100mm macro lens, f/4.5, ISO 200, tripod-locked, ultra sharp focus with natural depth, warm neutral grade, color-accurate commercial retouching, no yellow cast, no Instagram filter, no oversaturated reds, preserve natural ingredient grain. Avoid: any text, menu overlay, packaging, brand logos, plastic-looking food, extreme fisheye, overcrowding, dirty plate edges.
